lock_gate: Mac re-sweep cfg74 PF >= 1.0 on 2025-2026 every-tick

combined_portfolio_metrics._note: Combined risk = 0.6% per EA when both have positions open simultaneously; in practice this is rare since both fade RSI<35 in same session window, so most trades will overlap and effectively act as 1.2% risk on shared signal

primary.tester_model_name: Every tick based on real ticks

cross_validation.tester_model_name: Every tick based on real ticks
cross_validation.gate: cfg74 PF >= 1.0 required to lock deploy

deploy_checklist: Mac cross-validation gate cleared (cfg74 PF >= 1.0 on 2025-2026)
Vantage Standard STP MT5 logged in on VPS or Win machine
EA cfg74 attached to chart 1 with above params
EA cfg28 attached to chart 2 with above params
Verify two distinct magic numbers in EA settings (20260420 vs 20260421)
Enable AutoTrading - both EA icons show smiley face
Verify first trade executes correctly (lot size + SL/TP)
Daily monitoring for first 7 days, then weekly

rollback_plan.trigger: Combined live DD > 8% in first week OR either EA shows PF < 0.7 over 50+ live trades
rollback_plan.action: Reduce RiskPercent from 0.6 to 0.3 on both EAs and continue. If still degrading after another 50 trades, disable cfg28 (volume engine) and run cfg74 alone.
